taxonomy: Ebnerella pygmaea is a species of orchid. Ebnerella pygmaea is classified within the family Orchidaceae and is part of the genus Ebnerella. Within the Orchidaceae family, it is more specifically classified in the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Cranichideae. Ebnerella pygmaea is native to South Africa, adding to the diversity of orchids found in the region.
